title: Scotty and the Secret History of Hollywood
original_title: Scotty and the Secret History of Hollywood
overview: A deliciously scandalous portrait of unsung Hollywood legend Scotty Bowers, whose bestselling memoir chronicled his decades spent as sexual procurer to the stars.
